title: Force Flag
documentation:
## Purpose
A boolean flag that bypasses safety checks, cache lookups, or confirmation gates in a machine, forcing it to execute unconditionally. The exact behavior is machine-specific.

## When to use
Use this flag sparingly and only when you have confirmed that the bypassed checks are not needed for the current run (e.g., clearing a cache, re-running a completed step during debugging).

## Notes
Enabling this flag can have irreversible side effects depending on the machine. Document its intended effect clearly in any graph that uses it. It is separate from [Detailed Flag](https://capdag.com/browse/media:detailed-flag;textable), which controls output verbosity rather than execution behavior.
